Agentis Capital Advisors forms new Greenfield Project Team to advise on infrastructure projects in various sectors.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Agentis Capital Advisors revealed the establishment of a specialized Greenfield Project Team to guide clients in the creation of new infrastructure assets in various sectors. Cartesian Therapeutics grants inducement awards to five new employees, offering 168,360 shares at $19.89 each, vesting over four years.
news.summary: Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. announced inducement awards to five new employees on February 3, 2025. The options granted allow the employees to purchase 168,360 shares of the Company's stock at an exercise price of $19.89 per share. These options were granted under the Amended and Restated 2018 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, approved by the Company's board of directors. The options vest 25% on February 3, 2026, and then in three annual installments until fully vested on February 3, 2029. The options have a ten-year term and were granted under Rule 5635(c)(4) of the Nasdaq Listing Rules as inducement material for the new employees' employment.

(NYSE: NABL), a worldwide software firm aiding IT services providers in offering security, data protection as-a-service, and remote monitoring and management solutions, announced that CRN®, a division of The Channel Company, recognized five members of its international channel leadership team on the 2025 Channel Chiefs list. Each year, CRN releases the Channel Chiefs list, which highlights outstanding executives in the IT channel industry dedicated to ensuring quality services.

UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) will announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on February 20 at 8:30 a.m. EST.

A webcast and conference call are scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EST (7:30 a.m. CST) on the same day to discuss the outcomes. The conference call will be available to stream online, with a slide presentation accompanying it.

news.headline: Steel Partners and Camac Partners propose to acquire CreateAI for increased $0.60/share in cash. (Characters: 89)
news.summary: In New York, Steel Partners Holdings L.P. and Camac Partners LLC have jointly revealed plans to acquire all remaining shares of CreateAI Holdings Inc. (OTCMKTS: TSPH) that they do not already own. They sent a letter to the Company's Board of Directors proposing to purchase all outstanding Class A and Class B common stock at a raised price of $0.60 per share. Steel and Camac are current shareholders of the Company and aim to consolidate their ownership with this enhanced offer.

news.headline: The Designery's 1st Metro Atlanta location opens in Feb. Owner Alexandra & Specialist Julie aim to be top destination for designs.
news.summary: Alexandra Hauser and Julie Little aim to establish The Designery as Atlanta's premier destination for kitchen, bath, and closet designs. Located in the city, the full-service design center offers immersive experiences and top-notch services. The establishment, founded by Hauser, promises high-quality products and personalized solutions to cater to every need. The team envisions becoming the go-to one-stop shop for residents seeking expertly crafted and innovative design ideas.

news.headline: Terex reports strong 2024 results: $5.1B sales, $4.96 EPS, 10.3% operating margin, $6.11 adjusted EPS, 21.9% from ESG, $0.17 dividend.
news.summary: In the fiscal year ending in 2024, a company reported total sales reaching $5.1 billion. The full-year operating margins were at 10.3%, which increased to 11.3% when adjusted. Earnings per share for the year were $4.96, or $6.11 when adjusted. The company saw a substantial contribution from the ESG sector in the fourth quarter of 2024, with adjusted operating margins of 21.9%. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share was announced. The company is based in Norwalk, Conn., and the announcement was made on February 6, 2025.

news.headline: CEO Warrior's Sandy Papavero and Jason Noel to speak at WWETT Show in Feb, training contractors to grow business. #EWETTShow2025 #businessgrowth
news.summary: Top consultants will educate water and wastewater contractors on how to address concerns hindering their business expansion. This initiative was revealed by CEO Warrior, a renowned entity offering comprehensive business training and coaching to service business proprietors worldwide. The announcement was made on February 6, 2025, in Eatontown, New Jersey.

Global chloramine filters market expected to reach US$ 3.27 billion by 2034 with 6.5% CAGR. Demand rises due to health risks and water quality concerns. Products like Catalytic Activated Carbon Filters and Reverse Osmosis Systems are in high demand. Stringent regulations and technological advancements drive market growth. North America holds significant market share. APEC Water Systems, Aquasana, Pentair, Kinetico among top players.
news.summary: The global chloramine filters market was valued at US$1,744.3 million in 2024 and is projected to reach US$3,274.2 million by 2034, growing at a notable CAGR of 6.5%. The increasing demand for chloramine filters is fueled by concerns over safe drinking water and health risks associated with chloramine exposure, which can lead to respiratory diseases and skin irritation. Catalytic activated carbon filters and reverse osmosis systems are in high demand for removing chloramines. Stringent water quality regulations, consumer awareness, and technological advancements are also driving market growth. One in five Americans uses drinking water treated with chloramines, which can produce carcinogenic by-products. North America is expected to hold a market share of 6% in 2034. Key market players include APEC Water Systems, Aquasana, Pentair (Pelican), Kinetico, and others.

news.headline: MACOM Q1 2025: Revenue $218.1M (38.8% increase y-o-y), Gross margin 53%. NASDAQ: MTSI.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: MTSI), a prominent semiconductor products provider, unveiled its financial outcomes for the fiscal first quarter concluding on January 3, 2025. The revenue for this quarter reached $218.1 million, marking a substantial surge of 38.8% from $157.1 million in the corresponding period last year, and a growth of 8.7% from $200.7 million in the previous quarter. The gross margin stood at 53%.

This agreement, between the two entities, solidifies their shared dedication to artists, songwriters, and fans. Warner Music Group is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WMG.

news.headline: Paul Verdu takes over leadership roles in AB USA and Octopi Brewing, with $35M investment.
news.summary: Waunakee, Wisconsin - On February 6, 2025, Paul Verdu was named the Managing Director of both Asahi Beer USA, Inc. (AB USA) and Octopi Brewing, LLC. The companies are under Asahi Europe & International and are aiming to expand significantly under his leadership. AB USA is responsible for promoting Asahi Super Dry, a popular product in their portfolio.

news.summary: In Boston on February 6, 2025, Flimp, a leading provider of HR communication solutions, announced that employers can now customize, highlight, and securely deliver employee compensation, perks, and benefits packages. news.headline: Garmin recognized as Top Fitness Company with first-ever HRM-Fit monitor for women in 2025.
news.summary: Garmin, a leading company in the health and wellness industry, introduces the HRM-Fit heart rate monitor specifically designed for women. This groundbreaking product has positioned Garmin among the top companies revolutionizing health and fitness. The innovative HRM-Fit was unveiled in Olathe, Kansas, on February 6, 2025, garnering attention for its unique features tailored to women's needs. This move has further solidified Garmin's stature in the market. The company, listed as GRMN on the NYSE, has proven itself as a key player with a forward-thinking approach in enhancing the health and wellness sector.

news.headline: First view among majority: Disinflation is on track after looking through near-term pickup in inflation, warrants a gradual and "careful" approach
One member who voted for a larger rate cut sought an "activist" signal on the appropriateness of UK financial conditions, and said rates still need to stay restrictive for some time
Second view among majority: Pay, inflation pressure, and weak growth reflect supply constraints, warrant gradual and "cautious" rate-cutting

Altus Power will be acquired by TPG for $5/share in a $2.2 billion deal, making Altus largest US commercial-scale solar owner.
news.summary: Altus Power, Inc., a leading commercial-scale solar owner in the US, has revealed it will be acquired by TPG through the TPG Rise Climate Transition Infrastructure strategy. The agreement states that the acquisition will be for $5.00 per share of its Class A common stock. This all-cash transaction sets the total value of the Company at around $2.2 billion, which includes its outstanding debt. After the acquisition is finalized, Altus Power will be under TPG ownership.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips announces Q4 2024 earnings of $2.3 billion ($1.90 per share) and sets 2025 guidance and quarterly dividend.
news.summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) announced their fourth-quarter 2024 earnings in Houston, reporting $2.3 billion in profits, equivalent to $1.90 per share.

news.headline: Mustang Bio prices $8 million public offering, selling 2.6M shares, each at $3.01 with accompanying warrants, expected to close Feb 7, 2025.
news.summary: Mustang Bio, Inc. has announced a public offering of 2,657,807 shares of its common stock, Series C-1 warrants for 2,657,807 shares, and Series C-2 warrants for 2,657,807 shares. The offering is priced at $3.01 per share and includes accompanying warrants with an exercise price of $3.01 per share. The Series C-1 warrants expire in five years, while the Series C-2 warrants expire in twenty-four months from the date of stockholder approval. The closing of the offering is expected on or around February 7, 2025. Mustang Bio focuses on developing cell therapies for difficult-to-treat cancers.

OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ: ONEW) acquires American Yacht Group to enhance boat sales, finance, and services in Southeastern U.S.
news.summary: In Buford, Georgia, OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ: ONEW) disclosed the successful acquisition of American Yacht Group, solidifying its footprint in the Southeastern U.S. This move enriches the company's range of new and pre-owned boat sales, finance, insurance, and parts and services. By integrating American Yacht Group, OneWater aims to bolster its premium yacht selection and reinforce its status in the high-end marine market. This acquisition marks a strategic step in enhancing its overall market presence and offerings.

news.headline: Cleafy named Leader in 2024 SPARK Matrix for Enterprise Fraud Management by QKS Group due to tech excellence and customer experience.

news.headline: Mangoceuticals reports significant reduction in H1N1 viral load in Phase 1 studies, partners with Vipragen for expanded H5N1 research.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas, Texas, Mangoceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGRX) revealed advancements in its study on H1N1 effectiveness. The study is being carried out by Vipragen Biosciences, an AAALAC-accredited preclinical CRO in Mysuru, India, in conjunction with Intramont Technologies, Inc. The study focuses on Mangoceuticals' patented technology to prevent respiratory illnesses. Mangoceuticals is dedicated to creating and selling men’s wellness products and services through a secure telemedicine platform.
